name: Grade 9 Home Repair & DIY — Semester 1
description: An 18-week Grade 9 pathway for building disciplinary foundations through analysis, research, and projects through Home Repair & DIY. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 9 knowledge and transferable skills in building disciplinary foundations through analysis, research, and projects through Home Repair & DIY.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.

lessons.title: Launch inquiry: building disciplinary foundations through analysis, research, and projects through Home Repair & DIY
lessons.objective: I can develop a focused question and gather relevant evidence about building disciplinary foundations through analysis, research, and projects through Home Repair & DIY and explain my reasoning with appropriate evidence.
